name: 墲人之境-无人之境
short_description: 《Ashland》 is the subject of 1 v4 non-equilibrium games. Players can play the role of adventurers into the tomb, crack the mechanism, take away treasures. You can also act as a gravekeeper to stop and destroy them. Rich tomb exploration tools and tomb guarding skills for you to experience and play
detailed_description:
更新内容和反馈渠道

更新公告和反馈问题可以通过此页面

官方1群：783456476

避坑指南

  • 因为目前只租得起一台服务器，所以网络只支持大陆地区直连，其它地区会有较高延迟需要有加速器
  • 技术力有限，游戏会存在帧率卡顿问题，如较介意这类体验，可以提前避坑
  • 更新方面目前优先娱乐性和增加内容为主，阵营平衡问题短时间可能无法避免，较为介意的话目前也可以提前避坑


About the Game


*Tomb underground*
The dark and cold Moshan spirit hall, the magnificent princess Palace, the general wasteland flying wild grass, the quiet Chen ancestral temple, a different style of tomb and ground palace waiting to explore.


* Team adventurers *
You, from all over the world, may be students, doctors, broadcasters, or "enigmals" who have no identity at all. From the moment you become an adventurer, you may be ready to let go of the past, but who you were will become your forte. In order to explore the treasure in the depths of the tomb, for the common goal, everyone will choose to cooperate with the same life and death together, or alone touch the treasure to escape?


* The gravekeeper who keeps his promise alone
In the face of adventurers, they are fearsome keepers of the grave, but as "people" they also have their own stories. Or for love, or for gratitude, guard the millennium, alone. They have unique abilities, some of which are good at running fast, some of which are powerful, and some of which are good at ranged attack. All this is to warn adventurers, where the new people do not approach.


There are various props left by predecessors in the scene. There is a compass for locating treasure, a flying dragon claw for escaping, a medical box for healing wounds and blood Ganoderma, and an ancient sword and engineer shovel for helping to fight, and a reasonable collocation can improve the probability of treasure hunting. As an adventurer, these are your weapons. If you try to be a grave keeper, you can carry a variety of traps, as well as items unique to each guard, and the prey you are targeted will never be able to escape easily.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
